scripts.build: pnpm --filter @argon/shared build && pnpm --filter @argon/daemon build && pnpm --filter argon build && pnpm --filter @argon/web build
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @argon/shared build && concurrently -n daemon,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @argon/daemon dev" "pnpm --filter @argon/web dev"
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm --filter @argon/shared build && pnpm --filter @argon/daemon build && pnpm --filter argon build
